title: Trivitron Healthcare launches Kiran Smart Track app for radiation protection apparel tracking
summary: Application enables QR-based tracking, product verification and compliance management in healthcare settings
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Application enables QR-based tracking, product verification and compliance management in healthcare settings

Trivitron Healthcare has launched Kiran Smart Track, an application designed for tracking radiation protection or X-ray apparel. The company states that the application is the first of its kind in India and is aimed at supporting safety, compliance and operational processes in healthcare environments.

Kiran Smart Track uses a QR code embedded on each radiation protection product to provide access to product information. The application offers details including manufacturing data, specifications, protection levels and shelf life, supporting usage and compliance requirements.

Commenting on the launch, Chandra Ganjoo said, “Kiran Smart Track marks an important step in our journey to integrate innovation with safety. The app redefines how healthcare providers manage radiation protection apparel by offering smart, real-time visibility and greater control. At Trivitron, safety is non-negotiable, and this solution ensures that critical product information is always easily accessible to the user.”

The application includes features such as quality checks, shelf-life monitoring and access to product data through QR-based scanning. It allows users to verify product authenticity, identify products through unique codes and access specifications including core material, protection levels, size, colour, and quality and safety reports.

Serial numbers are used to support warranty management and inventory tracking. The application is designed to support decision-making, compliance requirements and inventory processes across hospitals and diagnostic centres.

With this launch, Trivitron Healthcare has introduced a digital system for managing radiation protection apparel within clinical environments.
